title: galactites tomentosus var. elegans
intro: Galactites tomentosus var. elegans, also known as Woolly Mullein or Desert Mullein, is a perennial herb belonging to the mullein family, with a silvery-gray appearance and white or yellowish flowers. The medicinal properties of Galactites tomentosus var. elegans lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Galactites tomentosus var. elegans can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, or taken internally to support respiratory health.
